For image generation to work:
1. wavespeed.ai → create account → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add WaveSpeed key

To create your voice agent:
1. elevenlabs.io → create account → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add ElevenLabs key

1. elevenlabs.io → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add ElevenLabs key
chat.preflight_voice_agent_body:
Set up your voice agent first:
1. elevenlabs.io → create account → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add ElevenLabs key
3. Enter `{'@'}create-agent` to create your agent

1. Access: `{'@'}pin free` or `{'@'}pin paid 0.001 0xWallet [7d]`

Every AI assistant can read your soul.

settings.title: Settings
settings.agent_cron_desc: Claude Code runs on this server on a schedule and works through tasks from the queue. No SSH needed — write tasks in the chat, the agent handles them.
settings.agent_not_installed_hint: Run init.sh and select the Agent setup step to install Claude Code automatically.
settings.agent_queue_desc: Add tasks here — the agent picks them up on the next run.
settings.agent_queue_placeholder: agent.md content is shown here — add markdown tasks for the agent.
settings.agent_no_api_key: No Anthropic API key — configure in the API tab first.
settings.agent_mcp_token_missing_hint: The agent runner no longer has its own service token. Create one now.
settings.health_sync_info: Health sync device affects how data is interpreted. All models use the Garmin Connect API.
settings.health_sync_not_configured: Not configured — save credentials first, then run: bash /opt/sys/health-sync/install.sh
settings.apple_health_info: For Apple Health, the Health-Sync app must be installed on your iPhone. Setup is done via SSH (install.sh).
settings.oura_info: Oura Ring API token is configured via SSH in the health_sync configuration.
settings.biometric_update_failed: Biometric credentials could not be updated — re-save once on next login.
settings.master_key_rotation: Master key rotation affects this instance. Grace period 15 min — after that old certs are invalid.
settings.privacy_desc: Controls whether your node is listed in the public SYS.Scan network (scan page, AI free-text search, llms.txt).
settings.privacy_on_hint: Your node appears in SYS.Scan and is findable via AI search.
settings.privacy_off_hint: Your node no longer appears in SYS.Scan, llms.txt, or AI free-text search. Note: not all SYS functions are available once this is off — external AI assistants can no longer stumble onto your soul randomly, only reach it via an already-known endpoint, QR code, or an existing trust connection. Anchor transactions already on the blockchain remain permanently public regardless — only future anchors will stop embedding your name/tags.
settings.privacy_permanence_warning: While discoverability is enabled, your name and tags are permanently and irrevocably written into a public Polygon transaction with every blockchain anchor; a Marketplace registration additionally pins your name, description, tags and wallet address to IPFS permanently. Disabling this later only prevents future publications — data already anchored or pinned cannot be retracted.
settings.privacy_save_failed: Could not save the change — please try again.
settings.cert_rotation_failed: Cert rotation failed — please reload the page and try again.
settings.admin_connect_desc: Enter the admin token you received during server setup. It is only stored locally in the browser.
settings.token_renewed_agent_failed: Token renewed ✓ · Agent update failed ({err}) — recreate agent
settings.master_key_rotated: Master key & cert rotated ✓ — sys.md downloaded. You remain logged in.
settings.master_key_cert_failed: Master key rotated — cert rotation failed. Renew manually in API tab.
settings.soul_not_loaded: Soul not loaded — please reload the page.
settings.webhook_rotate_msg: The ElevenLabs agent will be automatically updated with the new token. If that fails, a notice will appear.
settings.invite_desc: Share an invite code with a new user. The code allows them to register their Soul on this node. It rotates automatically after each registration.
settings.invite_not_generated: Not generated yet — rotate to create one.
settings.invite_hint: The code rotates automatically after a new Soul registers. You can also rotate it manually to invalidate the current code.

marketplace.private_node_disabled: This node was set up as a Private Node — the Marketplace (payments, Agent Sandbox access for external agents) is disabled and can only be enabled by re-running init.sh.
marketplace.discoverable_off_warning: Discoverability is turned off (Settings → Config → Privacy) — your node won't appear in SYS.Scan, llms.txt, or AI free-text search. Marketplace access and the IPFS pin still work, but only for already-known endpoints.
marketplace.step3_prose: For buyers without a Polygon wallet: verify payment outside the system yourself (e.g. PayPal), then issue an access token here manually — identical in format to a POL token, just without automatic on-chain verification.
marketplace.step1_prose: Specify whether other people’s AI assistants can access your Soul for free or for payment. Find access code and MCP peers under Peers.
marketplace.mode_free_desc: Every AI assistant can read your Soul data — without restriction.
marketplace.mode_pay_desc: Per access, a POL amount is automatically transferred to you.

marketplace.token_issued_hint: Shown only once — copy it now.
marketplace.free_mode_state: Every AI assistant can read your Soul data for free.
marketplace.step2_prose: Pins ERC-8004 metadata via Pinata. Your Soul then appears in the Marketplace and is discoverable by external agents.
marketplace.permanence_warning: Name, description, tags, wallet address and, if set, PayPal target are pinned permanently and irretrievably to IPFS (publicly accessible). Later disabling discoverability or re-pinning does not replace the already-published version — it remains reachable via the old CID/anchor.

marketplace.hero_sub: Make your Soul accessible to external AI assistants — via MCP tools, free or for POL. After that it's discoverable in the Marketplace.

anchor.discoverable_off_warning: Discoverability is turned off (Settings → Config → Privacy) — new anchors won't embed your name/tags in the calldata and won't appear in SYS.Scan. Anchoring itself (proof of ownership) still works normally.
anchor.permanence_warning: Name and tags will be written permanently and irreversibly into the Polygon blockchain with this anchor (public calldata) — later turning off "discoverable" only hides them from search/scan, it cannot retract data already anchored. In addition, the wallet address and, if set, the PayPal target are permanently pinned publicly on IPFS once the Marketplace listing is registered.

impressum.sub: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act) — for this node.
impressum.s2Content:
Phone: [REDACTED-PHONE]

Email: info@uxprojects-jok.com

I usually respond to enquiries within 48 hours.
impressum.s4Content: Pursuant to § 19 UStG (small business regulation) I do not charge VAT.
impressum.s5Content:
__NODE_URL__ — this SYS node, where actual data processing takes place (soul, vault, payments, peer communication)

https://sys.uxprojects-jok.com — SYS protocol site, informational only, no data processing
impressum.s6h2: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18(2) MStV
impressum.s7Content:
As a service provider I am responsible for my own content on this node in accordance with general law pursuant to §§ 7–10 DDG. However, pursuant to §§ 8–10 DDG, I am not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. Liability in this respect is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific infringement. Upon becoming aware of such infringements, I will remove such content immediately.
impressum.s8Content:
This node may contain links to external third-party websites over whose content I have no influence. I therefore cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.

The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not apparent at the time of linking. Upon becoming aware of infringements, I will remove such links immediately.
impressum.s9Content:
The SYS protocol code — frontend, backend Lua scripts, installation scripts and the sys.md format — is provided as open source under the Apache License 2.0. Details at /lizenz.

Trademarks: "SaveYourSoul" and "SYS" are trademarks of Jan-Oliver Karo. The Apache 2.0 license does not grant rights to use these trademarks. Details: NOTICE.
impressum.s10Content: This node runs on a self-managed VPS (no third-party cloud access to the processed data).
impressum.s11Content:
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/

I am not obliged or willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board pursuant to § 36 VSBG.
impressum.stand: As of: July 14, 2026 · © 2026 Jan-Oliver Karo. All rights reserved.

datenschutz.sub: Pursuant to GDPR (EU) 2016/679 — for this node.
datenschutz.introBox:
This privacy policy applies to this SYS node (__NODE_HOST__) — this is where your data is actually processed, unlike the pure protocol site sys.uxprojects-jok.com, which processes no personal data.

The node runs on a self-managed VPS — there is no third-party cloud service access to the data stored here.

The data stored here (vault content, health data, payment data, etc.) belongs to the operator of this node and remains under their sole control. Data about other people is only stored if those people actively transmit it themselves (e.g. by sending a peer message) — no data about third parties is collected without their own active action.
datenschutz.s2VaultContent: Text, images, audio and video that you upload to your vault yourself, or that the AI stores there during dialogue (e.g. profile photo, voice recordings for voice verification). This data is encrypted by default (AES-256) and readable only with your vault key; exceptions are a small number of files that stay unencrypted for technical reasons (e.g. shopping list, AI system prompts) and content you deliberately share publicly or with other SYS nodes. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of contract/use of the service) or (a) (consent, e.g. when uploading biometric reference images).
datenschutz.s2HealthContent: When Garmin sync is enabled, body metrics, sleep and activity data are stored in health.md. This data is health-related within the meaning of Art. 9 GDPR (special category personal data) and is only synced after your explicit consent. Legal basis: Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR.
datenschutz.s2PaymentContent: Polygon transaction hashes (publicly viewable on the blockchain, not stored by me except as a reference) for POL payments; for non-crypto payments (PayPal), the details communicated by the payment provider (amount, reference code), where needed to issue an access token. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of contract).
datenschutz.s2PeerContent: Messages you send to or receive from other SYS nodes (peer-to-peer, e.g. via peer_send/peer_inbox) are stored on this node for delivery/display. External peer messages are retained for a maximum of 48h. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. These messages originate exclusively from the respective peer themselves — no further data about connected people is collected or stored beyond what they actively transmit themselves.
datenschutz.s2LogsContent: As with any web server, technically necessary access data (timestamp, URL accessed, HTTP status, anonymised IP, user agent) is collected automatically. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Retention: up to 14 days.
datenschutz.s2AiContent: For the chat function with your own AI, the necessary content (your messages and the vault context relevant to the response) is transmitted to Anthropic PBC (Claude API, USA) for processing. If you use the voice function (phone agent), your voice recordings and the vault content you have shared are additionally transmitted to ElevenLabs Inc. (USA). Details on how these providers process data can be found in their own privacy policies (Anthropic, ElevenLabs). This only applies to your own, active use of these features — tool calls from connected paid agents or other SYS nodes (peers) are processed directly on this server and never reach Anthropic/ElevenLabs. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of contract/use of the service).
datenschutz.s2ChainContent: If you enable discoverability for your soul, your name and tags are permanently and irrevocably written into a public Polygon transaction with every blockchain anchor — later disabling discoverability only hides them from search/browse, it cannot retract data already anchored. If you additionally register on the Marketplace, your name, description, tags, wallet address and, if set, your PayPal target are permanently and irrevocably pinned to IPFS (publicly retrievable via the corresponding CID). These publications are technically irreversible — the right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR) can therefore only apply to data stored on this server, not to content already published on the blockchain/IPFS. A corresponding warning is shown before each activation of these features. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (explicit consent).
datenschutz.s3Content: Vault content, health and peer data remain stored until you delete them or delete your account. There is no automatic deletion period, since you as the user decide yourself how long your own soul continues to exist. Server logs are deleted after a maximum of 14 days.
datenschutz.s4Content: This node sets no tracking cookies for the service itself. Session/security cookies (e.g. gate session) are technically necessary (§ 25(2) No. 2 German TTDSG). For the optional, cookieless usage statistics via Plausible Analytics, see the consent banner on your first visit — details in section 6.
datenschutz.s5Content: This node runs on a self-managed VPS, operated by me personally — there is no access by conventional cloud storage providers (e.g. AWS, Google Cloud) to the data stored here; all vault content, payment data and health data remain exclusively on this server. For the AI chat and voice functions, content is transmitted to Anthropic or ElevenLabs for processing — see section 2.6.
datenschutz.s6Content: This node optionally uses, after your consent, Plausible Analytics in a self-hosted setup on a server in Germany (analytics.uxprojects-jok.com). Plausible works without cookies and creates no personal user profiles. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent). You can withdraw your consent at any time here or via the consent banner.
datenschutz.s7Intro: You have the following rights under GDPR against the controller:
datenschutz.rightAccessDesc: Art. 15 GDPR — information about stored data
datenschutz.rightRectDesc: Art. 16 GDPR — correction of inaccurate data
datenschutz.s7Contact: To exercise these rights, an informal email to info@uxprojects-jok.com is sufficient. You can also view, export or delete your vault content directly in the app under Settings at any time.
datenschutz.s8Content: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority. The authority responsible for the controller is: Der Hessische Beauftragte für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit (HBDI), Postfach 3163, 65021 Wiesbaden, Germany, Email: poststelle@datenschutz.hessen.de.
datenschutz.s9Content: No automated decision-making including profiling within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR takes place. Pursuant to § 38 BDSG, no data protection officer has been appointed, as the legal conditions are not met.

lizenz.sub: What the license covers — and what it doesn't.
lizenz.s1Content:
The SYS protocol code — frontend, backend Lua scripts, installation scripts and the sys.md format — is licensed as open source under the Apache License 2.0.

Copyright 2026 Jan-Oliver Karo, UX-Projects. Full license text: apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.
lizenz.s2h2: Ownership of the data stored on this node
lizenz.s2Content:
The SYS protocol code is openly licensed. The data stored on this node (your soul content — vault, sys.md, health data, payment history, peer messages) is the property of the node operator or the respective soul owner, and is expressly NOT part of the code license.

The Apache 2.0 license permits free use, modification and redistribution of the code — it grants no one rights to the personal content stored on a specific installation.
lizenz.s3Content: "SaveYourSoul" and "SYS" are trademarks of Jan-Oliver Karo. The Apache 2.0 license does not grant rights to use these trademarks. Details in the NOTICE document.
lizenz.s4Content:
Source code: github.com/uxprojectsjok/personal-sys-vps.

The software is provided without warranty (Apache 2.0, sections 7-8). The respective node operator is solely responsible for operating this specific node and for complying with applicable law (GDPR, TMG/DDG, etc.) — SYS provides infrastructure, not legal services.

consentBanner.text: This node uses, after your consent, an anonymous, cookieless analytics measurement (Plausible Analytics) to evaluate visits in aggregated form. No personal profiles are created. Details in the privacy policy.
